name: Cheng Ni
title: Software Engineer / Entrepreneur
bio:
Hello! I'm Cheng Ni, a passionate software engineer and entrepreneur. I'm dedicated to leveraging cutting-edge technology to solve real-world problems and create valuable products.

With solid full-stack development experience, I'm proficient in modern web technologies including React, TypeScript, Python, and more. I believe in the power of technology to change the world and make life better.
goal: Change the world with technology and create valuable products
